commit.message:
Fix JS: move all scripts to footer_custom (runs after DOM ready)

head_custom.html broke because Just the Docs processes <head> includes
before body content exists. Moving to footer_custom.html ensures all
DOM elements (tables, code blocks) are present when JS runs.

Also: histogram bars now show values above and bucket labels below each
bar. Uses unicode escape \u2192 for → to avoid encoding issues.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Polish portal: Konami glyphs, enriched copy, frontier identity

- Hero kicker: replace m-dash line with Konami glyph sequence (▲▲▼▼◄►◄►)
- Hero desc: 'No theory. No slide decks.' — sourced from WorkIQ
- Brand sub: 'Frontier Architecture' replaces 'AI Business Solutions'
- About copy: 'first-encounter customer scenarios' (from white paper)
- Code Samples card: clearer title + description
- Footer: aligned to frontier identity

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Enable surrogate pair range tests in character classes (#149)

* Add \\uhhhh unicode escape support to parser

Parse \\uhhhh (exactly 4 hex digits) in regex patterns, matching JDK
behavior. When a high surrogate is followed by a \\uhhhh low surrogate,
they are combined into a single supplementary code point.

Fixes #133

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Add inline flags (?d) and (?u); fix (?U) to mean UNICODE_CHARACTER_CLASS

Add (?d) for UNIX_LINES and (?u) for UNICODE_CASE inline flags.
Remap (?U) from RE2's NON_GREEDY to JDK's UNICODE_CHARACTER_CLASS,
which enables both UNICODE_GROUPS and UNICODE_CHAR_CLASS.

Fixes #134

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Fix nested repetition limit for alternation branches

countRepeat was compounding repeat counts across alternation branches
sequentially, treating them as if all branches were visited. For
ALTERNATE nodes, only one branch is taken at match time, so only the
worst-case (most expensive) branch should be considered.

Fixes #135

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Make Unicode property name lookup loose per UTS#18

Property name lookups now ignore case, underscores, hyphens, and spaces,
matching JDK behavior and UTS#18 requirements. Both binary properties
and script/category names use the same normalization. For example,
\p{IsWhiteSpace} now matches \p{IsWhite_Space}.

Fixes #136

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Accept \b{g} grapheme cluster boundary syntax

Parse \b{g} without error for JDK compatibility. Currently approximated
as an empty match (matches at every position) since full UAX#29 boundary
detection is not yet implemented.

Fixes #137

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Fix three-digit octal escape \0nnn parsing

The \0 escape now consumes up to three octal digits (max value 0377),
matching JDK behavior. Previously only two digits were consumed, so
\0101 was parsed as \010 + literal '1' instead of octal 101 (= 'A').

Fixes #138

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Implement character class intersection/subtraction (&&)

Add support for the && operator inside character classes, matching JDK
behavior. [a-z&&[def]] now correctly matches only d/e/f, and
[a-z&&[^bc]] correctly excludes b and c.

Added CharClassBuilder.intersect() for computing the intersection of
two character classes using a merge of sorted range sets.

Fixes #139

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Enable surrogate pair range tests in character classes

The \uhhhh surrogate pair combination added in #133 already handles
surrogate pair ranges in character classes correctly. The \u escape
parser combines high+low surrogate pairs into supplementary code points,
so [\uD800\uDC00-\uDBFF\uDFFF] is correctly parsed as [U+10000-U+10FFFF].

Fixes #140

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

repository.name: safere
repository.description: A safe linear-time regular expression matching library for Java, based on RE2

feat: apply 10 Astro 6 / landing page modernisation improvements (#69)

* Initial plan

* feat: apply all 10 Astro 6 / landing page improvements

1. astro.config.mjs: Add memoryCache import + experimental.cache block
2. blog/index.astro: Add transition:name on post cards and titles
2. blog/[slug].astro: Add matching transition:name on h1 and hero wrapper
3. global.css: Add scroll-driven animation keyframe + .animate-on-scroll utility

4. blog/[slug].astro: Use <Image /> for local-path hero with fetchpriority=high
5. config.ts: Add blog entry to PAGE_META (auto-generates /og/blog.png)
5. blog/index.astro: Point OG image meta to /og/blog.png
7. BaseHead.astro + blog pages: color-scheme -> dark light
8. package.json: Zod ^3.x -> ^4.0.0
9. All pages with Nav: add transition:persist=nav
10. BaseHead.astro: Add PostHog preconnect + dns-prefetch"

commit.message:
fix: correct 8 errors in context-adaptive-uam-model report

- Residual window: 2h → 4h (EXP-1791)
- Context count: 5 → 6 (add exercise_like, stable; not 'other')
- Fasting R²: ~−2.0/−1.5 → −0.32/−0.32 (no improvement)
- Correction R²: ~−4.0/−3.0 → −3.65/−1.39
- Post-meal improvement sign: −3.3 → +3.3
- UAM detection method: dG/dt threshold → residual + acceleration
- Patient f values: −2.79/−0.73 → −2.54/−0.93
- Worst patient: i (chimera) → h (actual worst)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

- Skills as plain list, education in sidebar

commit.message:
Fix Mermaid: CSP allow jsdelivr + use pre tag for whitespace

- Add cdn.jsdelivr.net and unsafe-eval to CSP script-src
- Switch render hook from div to pre tag (preserves indentation through Hugo minify)
- Add pre.mermaid CSS to override default pre styling
- Root cause: CSP blocked the Mermaid CDN script entirely, and
  Hugo minify stripped indentation from div (breaks timeline syntax)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

[fix](be) Restore workload group limit refresh after memory recovery (#62070)

### What problem does this PR solve?

Problem Summary: 
1. Refresh_workload_group_memory_state() returned early when aggregate
workload-group memory usage was zero. That skipped
update_queries_limit_(), so per-query memory limits could stay
artificially low after memory pressure had already eased.
2. Paused workload queries were not handled correctly around recent
query cancellation. The manager could return too early, fail to clear
resumed or expired paused entries, and skip restoring effective query
memory limits under recovery. This change fixes those branches and adds
unit tests that directly cover the recent-cancel and Phase 3 cleanup
paths.

commit.message:
fix(f11): correct spec default (5000→3000ms) and tighten log assertion

- Spec R2.1 said 5000ms default; implementation and TDR say 3000ms — align spec
- Log assertion now checks error message content (':crash') not just URL

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: correct OS detection and BTRFS disk pressure for GDX/HWE builds

lib.sh: For chained builds (GDX, HWE), BASE_IMAGE env var reflects the
intermediate TunaOS stage image (e.g. ghcr.io/tuna-os/yellowfin:gnome50)
because Containerfile sets ENV BASE_IMAGE=${BASE_IMAGE} from the build arg.
This caused IS_ALMALINUXKITTEN to be false for gnome50-gdx, sending it down
the wrong NVIDIA install path (akmods with a mismatched kernel).

Fix: read BASE_IMAGE from image-info.json written by the previous stage when
present. That file records the true OS base (e.g. almalinux-bootc:10-kitten)
set during stage 1, giving correct OS detection for all downstream stages.
Fall back to env/os-release only when image-info.json doesn't exist yet.

Also fix a typo in print_debug_info (wrong image-info.json path).

Justfile: Replace targeted podman rmi calls with podman system prune -af.
Removing only pre-chunk + chain base leaves akmods multi-stage FROM images
in BTRFS, which still causes disk pressure and the 'image not known' bug.
Containerfile.final only needs the rechunked archive loaded next, so pruning
everything at this point is safe and fully clears the BTRFS volume.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Co-authored-by: keijo00 <274944186+keijo00@users.noreply.github.com>

EXP-1901: Retrospective validation of settings recommendations

5-experiment series validating that natural-experiment-derived pump
settings (ISF, basal, CR) from training data predict glucose outcomes
on held-out verification days (every 10th day, 18 days/patient).

Key findings (11 patients, 1,838 patient-days):
- EXP-1901: ISF concordance train↔verify = 0.849 ± 0.121 (8/11 > 0.8)
- EXP-1903: ISF temporal CV = 4.6% (stable, excluding outlier k)
- EXP-1905: Within-patient mismatch→TIR r = -0.371, p = 0.0007
  (higher mismatch windows have worse TIR within each patient)
- EXP-1907: 5-fold CV ISF stability = 4.8% (9/11 stable)
- EXP-1909: Train→verify TIR r = 0.973 (glucose control is stable trait)

Simpson's paradox: Population mismatch→TIR is positive (+0.186) because
AID compensates cross-patient, but within-patient effect is consistently
negative (8/10 patients). Fisher z-transform properly resolves this.

Production integration:
- Added temporal_stability_cv and validation_note to SettingsOptimizationResult
- ISF period-spread CV flags instability (>15% triggers warning)
- Validation note contextualizes recommendations with EXP-1901 evidence
- All 106 production tests pass

Artifacts: exp_clinical_1901.py, report, fig66-fig70, results JSON.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

as a fallback but the function was never defined, causing CI compilation
failure on Linux. Add it as a variant of sta_keyed_property_inner that

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Fix nested repetition limit for alternation branches (#144)

* Add \\uhhhh unicode escape support to parser

Parse \\uhhhh (exactly 4 hex digits) in regex patterns, matching JDK
behavior. When a high surrogate is followed by a \\uhhhh low surrogate,
they are combined into a single supplementary code point.

Fixes #133

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Add inline flags (?d) and (?u); fix (?U) to mean UNICODE_CHARACTER_CLASS

Add (?d) for UNIX_LINES and (?u) for UNICODE_CASE inline flags.
Remap (?U) from RE2's NON_GREEDY to JDK's UNICODE_CHARACTER_CLASS,
which enables both UNICODE_GROUPS and UNICODE_CHAR_CLASS.

Fixes #134

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Fix nested repetition limit for alternation branches

countRepeat was compounding repeat counts across alternation branches
sequentially, treating them as if all branches were visited. For
ALTERNATE nodes, only one branch is taken at match time, so only the
worst-case (most expensive) branch should be considered.

Fixes #135

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix(vite): force host 127.0.0.1 to prevent IPv6-only binding causing 502

Vite on macOS may bind to [::1] (IPv6) when started without explicit host.
Tailscale Serve forwards to http://127.0.0.1:19147 (IPv4) → connection refused → 502.

Fix: add server.host: '127.0.0.1' in vite.config.ts to guarantee IPv4 binding.

commit.message:
fix: delete_task 改用 CASCADE / sources_cleaned 改為 per-cycle

Issue 1 — delete_task 無條件刪除 processing_lock 的副作用
  原 transaction 先 DELETE processing_lock 再 guarded DELETE conversion_tasks。
  若任務在兩者之間被 process_daemon 搶走（pending→processing），
  lock row 已被刪除但 conversion_tasks DELETE 是 no-op，
  造成有 is_processing=TRUE 卻無 lock row 的不一致狀態。
  修正：移除顯式 DELETE processing_lock，改由 ON DELETE CASCADE 自動清除；
  transaction 精簡為單一 guarded DELETE，以 rowcounts[0] 判斷是否成功。

Issue 2 — sources_cleaned 是 lifetime 累計值，與其他 per-cycle 統計不一致
  scan_directory() 每次重置 files_scanned / tasks_added / errors，
  但 sources_cleaned 用 += 累加，造成語意不一致。
  修正：在 scan_directory() 開頭重置 sources_cleaned = 0，
  run() 改用 = 而非 += 接收 cleanup_deleted_sources() 的回傳值。
  更新相關測試 execute_transaction.return_value 為單元素 list。

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix(f9): fix toHcmDate timezone bug and add missing test coverage

- Fix toHcmDate() to use format(date, 'yyyy-MM-dd') from date-fns instead
  of toISOString().slice(0, 10), which produced wrong dates in UTC+ timezones
- Update approve test suite mock dates to use local-midnight constructors
  (new Date(2025, 5, 1)) so toHcmDate round-trips correctly in any timezone
- Add controller unit tests for 400/422/503 propagation in approve()
- Add BalanceAuditService getHistory test for HCM_SYNC reason filter
- Add RESERVATION_RELEASE assertion to INVALID_DIMENSIONS service test
- Add actorId forwarding tests for INSUFFICIENT_BALANCE and INVALID_DIMENSIONS
  rejection paths
- Add submitTimeOff.not.toHaveBeenCalled() assertion to reject() happy path
- Add audit entry assertion to INVALID_DIMENSIONS integration test

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Initial release: LoadLens v1.0.0 — RPS Load Testing & Capacity Planning Toolkit

Features:
- FastAPI server with CPU/IO/mixed/flaky workload endpoints
- Async load generator with token bucket RPS control
- HDR histogram metrics (P50/P95/P99/P999 latency)
- Rate limiter with backpressure monitoring
- Circuit breaker (closed/open/half-open states)
- Connection pool manager with utilization metrics
- Streamlit real-time dashboard with Plotly charts
- Interactive educational CLI (Why 8 RPS is nothing)
- Little's Law capacity planner
- Docker + docker-compose support
- 86 unit and integration tests (100% passing)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

repository.name: loadlens
repository.description: 📊 RPS Load Testing & Capacity Planning Toolkit — understand why 8 RPS per machine is nothing

commit.message:
Funnel: auto-size font to fit narrowest bar (minWidth/8, 3-10px range)

After rendering, measures the narrowest bar's pixel width and sets
font-size = width/8 (clamped 3-10px). Percentages get 75% of that.
Always fits regardless of screen size or bar width.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
